title: fagraea gardeniiflora
intro: Fagraea gardeniiflora, also known as the Gardenia flower tree or the fragrant tree, is a species of plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is a tropical evergreen tree native to the forests of Malaysia and the Philippines. The medicinal properties of Fagraea gardeniiflora include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids in the plant. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams.
